title: Enterprise SaaS Agreement with Full Protections

ground_truth.rationale: Gold-standard enterprise SaaS agreement. All protections are bilateral and capped: 99.9% SLA with service credits, DPA with SCCs for international data transfers, capped mutual indemnification, bilateral limitation of liability (fees-paid with consequential exclusion), reasonable term and termination. Zero issues expected. The mutual-capped-indemnity suppression and standard NDA suppression should cap any spurious findings to LOW.
